title: Tools
subtitle: Build, fix, and learn tool names

cards.title: Hammer
cards.question: What tool is this?
cards.answerText: Hammer! Tap tap tap, the hammer helps build. Great job!
cards.funText: Hammer! Tap tap tap, the hammer helps build. Great job!

cards.title: Screwdriver
cards.question: Which tool do you see?
cards.answerText: Screwdriver! Twist twist, the screwdriver helps turn screws. Nice one!
cards.funText: Screwdriver! Twist twist, the screwdriver helps turn screws. Nice one!

cards.title: Wrench
cards.question: Can you name this tool?
cards.answerText: Wrench! Turn turn, the wrench helps fix things. Awesome!
cards.funText: Wrench! Turn turn, the wrench helps fix things. Awesome!

cards.title: Pliers
cards.question: What helper tool is this?
cards.answerText: Pliers! Squeeze squeeze, pliers help hold things. Good job!
cards.funText: Pliers! Squeeze squeeze, pliers help hold things. Good job!

cards.title: Saw
cards.question: What do builders use here?
cards.answerText: Saw! A saw is a grown-up tool for cutting. Great work!
cards.funText: Saw! A saw is a grown-up tool for cutting. Great work!

cards.title: Tape Measure
cards.question: Do you know this tool?
cards.answerText: Tape measure! Stretch it out and measure. You got it!
cards.funText: Tape measure! Stretch it out and measure. You got it!

cards.title: Level
cards.question: What tool is on the card?
cards.answerText: Level! The level helps make things straight. Way to go!
cards.funText: Level! The level helps make things straight. Way to go!

cards.title: Drill
cards.question: Can you say this tool name?
cards.answerText: Drill! Whirr whirr, the drill helps make holes. Nice one!
cards.funText: Drill! Whirr whirr, the drill helps make holes. Nice one!

cards.title: Paintbrush
cards.question: What tool is this?
cards.answerText: Paintbrush! Swish swish, the paintbrush makes color. Awesome!
cards.funText: Paintbrush! Swish swish, the paintbrush makes color. Awesome!

cards.title: Paint Roller
cards.question: Which tool do you see?
cards.answerText: Paint roller! Roll roll, the paint roller covers big spaces. Great job!
cards.funText: Paint roller! Roll roll, the paint roller covers big spaces. Great job!

cards.title: Toolbox
cards.question: Can you name this tool?
cards.answerText: Toolbox! The toolbox keeps tools together. Good work!
cards.funText: Toolbox! The toolbox keeps tools together. Good work!

cards.title: Nails
cards.question: What helper tool is this?
cards.answerText: Nails! Tiny nails help hold things in place. Nice one!
cards.funText: Nails! Tiny nails help hold things in place. Nice one!

cards.title: Screws
cards.question: What do builders use here?
cards.answerText: Screws! Twist twist, screws help hold things tight. You got it!
cards.funText: Screws! Twist twist, screws help hold things tight. You got it!

cards.title: Nuts & Bolts
cards.question: Do you know this tool?
cards.answerText: Nuts and bolts! Turn them together to hold things tight. Great work!
cards.funText: Nuts and bolts! Turn them together to hold things tight. Great work!

cards.title: Utility Knife
cards.question: What tool is on the card?
cards.answerText: Utility knife! That is a grown-up tool. We only look with our eyes. Good job learning!
cards.funText: Utility knife! That is a grown-up tool. We only look with our eyes. Good job learning!

cards.title: Clamp
cards.question: Can you say this tool name?
cards.answerText: Clamp! Squeeze and hold, the clamp keeps things still. Awesome!
cards.funText: Clamp! Squeeze and hold, the clamp keeps things still. Awesome!

cards.title: Measuring Square
cards.question: What tool is this?
cards.answerText: Measuring square! It helps builders make straight corners. Way to go!
cards.funText: Measuring square! It helps builders make straight corners. Way to go!

cards.title: Safety Goggles
cards.question: Which tool do you see?
cards.answerText: Safety goggles! Goggles help protect your eyes. Great job!
cards.funText: Safety goggles! Goggles help protect your eyes. Great job!

cards.title: Work Gloves
cards.question: Can you name this tool?
cards.answerText: Work gloves! Gloves help keep hands safe. Nice one!
cards.funText: Work gloves! Gloves help keep hands safe. Nice one!

cards.title: Hard Hat
cards.question: What helper tool is this?
cards.answerText: Hard hat! A hard hat helps protect your head. Awesome!
cards.funText: Hard hat! A hard hat helps protect your head. Awesome!

question: What tool is this?
questionVariants: What tool is on the card?
Can you say this tool name?
